items.title: One of the biggest lessons thus far in building AI agents is you have to be brutally unse…
items.title_zh: 迄今为止，构建人工智能代理的最大教训之一是，你必须残酷地了解……
items.description: One of the biggest lessons thus far in building AI agents is you have to be brutally unsentimental in your architecture. The models get better and better at handling things you previously built scaffolding for, you need to ruthlessly jetti…
items.description_zh: 迄今为止，构建人工智能代理的最大教训之一是，你的架构必须非常冷静。模型在处理你之前搭建脚手架的事情方面变得越来越好，你需要无情地抛弃……
